name: FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS INC
summary: GENERAL The Parent is a financial holding company organized in 1931 under the laws of New York State (New York or NYS). The principal office of the Parent is located at 220 Liberty Street, Warsaw, New York 14569 and its telephone number is (585) 786-1100. The Parent was incorporated on September 15, 1931, but the continuity of the Companys banking business is traced to the organization of the National Bank of Geneva on March 28, 1817.
